revision.text:
'''戊戌'''（つちのえいぬ、ぼじゅつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
[[甲子]]から数えて35番目で、前は[[丁酉]]、次は[[己亥]]である。[[十干]]の[[五行思想|五行]]は土、[[十二支]]の五行は土で、[[五行思想#比和|比和]]である。
==戊戌の年==
==戊戌の日== ===[[選日]]=== 戊戌の日は[[天一天上]]の6日目である。

revision.comment: Programmatically generating so that if this gets imported to wikipedia as a draft, the bot will attribute it to Immanuelle and send them g6 warnings

revision.text:
{{干支}} '''戊戌'''（つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ）は、[[干支]]の一つ。
干支の組み合わせの35番目で、前は[[丁酉]]、次は[[己亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==戊戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って38が余る年が戊戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[38年]] *[[98年]] *[[158年]] *[[218年]] *[[278年]] *[[338年]] *[[398年]] *[[458年]] *[[518年]] *[[578年]] *[[638年]] *[[698年]] *[[758年]] *[[818年]] *[[878年]] *[[938年]] *[[998年]] | *[[1058年]] *[[1118年]] *[[1178年]] *[[1238年]] *[[1298年]] *[[1358年]] *[[1418年]] *[[1478年]] *[[1538年]] *[[1598年]] *[[1658年]] *[[1718年]] *[[1778年]] *[[1838年]] *[[1898年]] *[[1958年]] | *[[2018年]] *[[2078年]] *[[2138年]] *[[2198年]] *[[2258年]] *[[2318年]] *[[2378年]] *[[2438年]] *[[2498年]] *[[2558年]] *[[2618年]] *[[2678年]] *[[2738年]] *[[2798年]] *[[2858年]] *[[2918年]] *[[2978年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[天保]]9年（1838年） - [[高野長英]]が[[戊戌夢物語]]を著す。 *[[光緒]]24年（1898年） - 清で[[戊戌の変法]]、[[戊戌の政変]]があった。
==戊戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[9月]]が戊戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊戌の日== 戊戌の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 戊戌の日は[[天一天上]]の6日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つちのえいぬ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle]] [[Category:new pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[category{戊戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[ja:戊戌]]

==戊戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[9月]]が戊戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''戊戌'''（つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの35番目で、前は[[丁酉]]、次は[[己亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==戊戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って38が余る年が戊戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[38年]] *[[98年]] *[[158年]] *[[218年]] *[[278年]] *[[338年]] *[[398年]] *[[458年]] *[[518年]] *[[578年]] *[[638年]] *[[698年]] *[[758年]] *[[818年]] *[[878年]] *[[938年]] *[[998年]] | *[[1058年]] *[[1118年]] *[[1178年]] *[[1238年]] *[[1298年]] *[[1358年]] *[[1418年]] *[[1478年]] *[[1538年]] *[[1598年]] *[[1658年]] *[[1718年]] *[[1778年]] *[[1838年]] *[[1898年]] *[[1958年]] | *[[2018年]] *[[2078年]] *[[2138年]] *[[2198年]] *[[2258年]] *[[2318年]] *[[2378年]] *[[2438年]] *[[2498年]] *[[2558年]] *[[2618年]] *[[2678年]] *[[2738年]] *[[2798年]] *[[2858年]] *[[2918年]] *[[2978年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[天保]]9年（1838年） - [[高野長英]]が[[戊戌夢物語]]を著す。 *[[光緒]]24年（1898年） - 清で[[戊戌の変法]]、[[戊戌の政変]]があった。
==戊戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[9月]]が戊戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊戌の日== 戊戌の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 戊戌の日は[[天一天上]]の6日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つちのえいぬ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Dog-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Dog-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[ja:戊戌]]

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''戊戌'''（つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycle comprehensiveの組み合わせの35番目で、前は[[丁酉]]、次は[[己亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==戊戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って38が余る年が戊戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[38年]] *[[98年]] *[[158年]] *[[218年]] *[[278年]] *[[338年]] *[[398年]] *[[458年]] *[[518年]] *[[578年]] *[[638年]] *[[698年]] *[[758年]] *[[818年]] *[[878年]] *[[938年]] *[[998年]] | *[[1058年]] *[[1118年]] *[[1178年]] *[[1238年]] *[[1298年]] *[[1358年]] *[[1418年]] *[[1478年]] *[[1538年]] *[[1598年]] *[[1658年]] *[[1718年]] *[[1778年]] *[[1838年]] *[[1898年]] *[[1958年]] | *[[2018年]] *[[2078年]] *[[2138年]] *[[2198年]] *[[2258年]] *[[2318年]] *[[2378年]] *[[2438年]] *[[2498年]] *[[2558年]] *[[2618年]] *[[2678年]] *[[2738年]] *[[2798年]] *[[2858年]] *[[2918年]] *[[2978年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[天保]]9年（1838年） - [[高野長英]]が[[戊戌夢物語]]を著す。 *[[光緒]]24年（1898年） - 清で[[戊戌の変法]]、[[戊戌の政変]]があった。
==戊戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[9月]]が戊戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊戌の日== 戊戌の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 戊戌の日は[[天一天上]]の6日目である。 ==関連項目== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{DEFAULTSORT:つちのえいぬ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle comprehensive]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Dog-qq]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:properly attributed pages]][[Category:戊戌]][[Category:properly attributed pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Dog-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:subst:NAMESPACE]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Earth Dog]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[ja:戊戌]]

==戊戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って38が余る年が戊戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[38年]] *[[98年]] *[[158年]] *[[218年]] *[[278年]] *[[338年]] *[[398年]] *[[458年]] *[[518年]] *[[578年]] *[[638年]] *[[698年]] *[[758年]] *[[818年]] *[[878年]] *[[938年]] *[[998年]] | *[[1058年]] *[[1118年]] *[[1178年]] *[[1238年]] *[[1298年]] *[[1358年]] *[[1418年]] *[[1478年]] *[[1538年]] *[[1598年]] *[[1658年]] *[[1718年]] *[[1778年]] *[[1838年]] *[[1898年]] *[[1958年]] | *[[2018年]] *[[2078年]] *[[2138年]] *[[2198年]] *[[2258年]] *[[2318年]] *[[2378年]] *[[2438年]] *[[2498年]] *[[2558年]] *[[2618年]] *[[2678年]] *[[2738年]] *[[2798年]] *[[2858年]] *[[2918年]] *[[2978年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[天保]]9年（1838年） - [[高野長英]]が[[戊戌夢物語]]を著す。 *[[光緒]]24年（1898年） - 清で[[戊戌の変法]]、[[戊戌の政変]]があった。
==戊戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[9月]]が戊戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。

{{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive}} '''戊戌'''（つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ）は、[[Sexagenary cycle]]の一つ。
Sexagenary cycleの組み合わせの35番目で、前は[[丁酉]]、次は[[己亥]]である。[[陰陽五行思想|陰陽五行]]では、[[十干]]の[[戊]]は陽の[[土]]、[[十二支]]の[[戌]]は陽の[[土]]で、[[五行思想#比和（ひわ）|比和]]である。
==戊戌の年== [[西暦]]年を60で割って38が余る年が戊戌の[[年]]となる。 {| class="wikitable" |+'''戊戌の年''' |- ![[1千年紀]]!![[2千年紀]]!![[3千年紀]] |- | *[[38年]] *[[98年]] *[[158年]] *[[218年]] *[[278年]] *[[338年]] *[[398年]] *[[458年]] *[[518年]] *[[578年]] *[[638年]] *[[698年]] *[[758年]] *[[818年]] *[[878年]] *[[938年]] *[[998年]] | *[[1058年]] *[[1118年]] *[[1178年]] *[[1238年]] *[[1298年]] *[[1358年]] *[[1418年]] *[[1478年]] *[[1538年]] *[[1598年]] *[[1658年]] *[[1718年]] *[[1778年]] *[[1838年]] *[[1898年]] *[[1958年]] | *[[2018年]] *[[2078年]] *[[2138年]] *[[2198年]] *[[2258年]] *[[2318年]] *[[2378年]] *[[2438年]] *[[2498年]] *[[2558年]] *[[2618年]] *[[2678年]] *[[2738年]] *[[2798年]] *[[2858年]] *[[2918年]] *[[2978年]] |} ===出来事=== *[[天保]]9年（1838年） - [[高野長英]]が[[戊戌夢物語]]を著す。 *[[光緒]]24年（1898年） - 清で[[戊戌の変法]]、[[戊戌の政変]]があった。
==戊戌の月== 西暦年の下1桁が1・6（十干が[[辛]]・[[丙]]）の年の[[9月]]が戊戌の[[月 (暦)|月]]となる。ただしここでいう月は、[[旧暦]]の月や[[節月]]（[[寒露]]から[[立冬]]の前日まで）を適用する場合もある。
==戊戌の日== 戊戌の日の[[選日]]は以下の通り。 ===選日=== 戊戌の日は[[天一天上]]の6日目である。 ==See Also== *{{prefix}} *{{intitle}} {{citation needed|つちのえいぬ}} [[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Dog-qq]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:戊戌]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]][[Category:戊戌]][[Category:pgoodbye $1]][[Category:new pages]] [[Category:Unsorted completion categories]] [[Category:qq---qq]] [[Category:qq-Yang Earth Dog-qq]] [[Category:ZZZZZZZZZ Unlinked]] [[Category:q--q]] [[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]][[sn:Yang Earth Dog]][[Category:bumping to try to fix the sexagenary stuff]] [[sn:Yang Earth Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Earth Dog]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Earth Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Earth Dog]][[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Earth Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Yang Earth Dog]][[Category:qq]] [[ja:戊戌]] [[ja:Yang Earth Dog]]

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: boshu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

=== Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|qq=|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|qq=|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|qq=|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|qq=|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|qq=|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|qq=|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|qq=|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|qq=|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: boshu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

=== Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: boshu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

=== Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sáe̤k]][[de:Erde-Hund]][[hak:Vú-sut]][[ja:戊戌]][[ko:무술 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Hund]][[vi:Mậu Tuất]][[za:Fouhswt]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sut]][[zh-yue:戊戌]][[zh:戊戌]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904922]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dog [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dog|kanji=戊戌|romaji=tsuchinoe inu|onyomi=bojutsu|p=wùxū|w=wu-hsü|mi=u⁵⁵ ɕy|y=mou6 seot1|j=mou6 seot1|ci=mɐu sœt̚|mc=məu syt|oc-bs=mə ssu|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dog also known as 戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sáe̤k]][[de:Erde-Hund]][[hak:Vú-sut]][[ja:戊戌]][[ko:무술 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Hund]][[vi:Mậu Tuất]][[za:Fouhswt]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sut]][[zh-yue:戊戌]][[zh:戊戌]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904922]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dog [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dog|kanji=戊戌|romaji=tsuchinoe inu|onyomi=bojutsu|p=wùxū|w=wu-hsü|mi=u⁵⁵ ɕy|y=mou6 seot1|j=mou6 seot1|ci=mɐu sœt̚|mc=məu syt|oc-bs=mə ssu|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dog also known as 戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: boshu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dog== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 38 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Wuxu. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Wuxu''' |- ! === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sáe̤k]][[de:Erde-Hund]][[hak:Vú-sut]][[ja:戊戌]][[ko:무술 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Hund]][[vi:Mậu Tuất]][[za:Fouhswt]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sut]][[zh-yue:戊戌]][[zh:戊戌]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904922]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dog [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dog|kanji=戊戌|romaji=tsuchinoe inu|onyomi=bojutsu|p=wùxū|w=wu-hsü|mi=u⁵⁵ ɕy|y=mou6 seot1|j=mou6 seot1|ci=mɐu sœt̚|mc=məu syt|oc-bs=mə ssu|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle comprehensive|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dog also known as 戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: boshu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dog== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 38 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Wuxu. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Wuxu''' |- ! It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: boshu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dog== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 38 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Wuxu. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Wuxu''' |- ! === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

(戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: boshu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dog== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 38 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Wuxu. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Wuxu''' |- ! === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[af:Aardhond (astrologie)]][[cdo:Muô-sáe̤k]][[de:Erde-Hund]][[hak:Vú-sut]][[ja:戊戌]][[ko:무술 (간지)]][[nds:Eer-Hund]][[vi:Mậu Tuất]][[za:Fouhswt]][[zh-min-nan:Bō͘-sut]][[zh-yue:戊戌]][[zh:戊戌]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q904922]] Wikidata name: Yang Earth Dog [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:27, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dog|kanji=戊戌|romaji=tsuchinoe inu|onyomi=bojutsu|p=wùxū|w=wu-hsü|mi=u⁵⁵ ɕy|y=mou6 seot1|j=mou6 seot1|ci=mɐu sœt̚|mc=məu syt|oc-bs=mə ssu|qq=}} {{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}} '''Yang Earth Dog also known as 戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the [[:en:Sexagenary cycle|Sexagenary cycle]].
It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: boshu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe
