=== Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

=== Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. ==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: boshu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

=== Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the [[:en:Heavenly Stems|Ten Heavenly Stems]]’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} --> ==Years of Yang Earth Dog== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 38 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Wuxu. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Wuxu''' |- ! === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

==Pronunciation== * English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌) ** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū ** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1 ** Japanese: ***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu ***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu ***Onyomi 1: boshu ** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술) ** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

--> ==Years of Yang Earth Dog== A year in the [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] that leaves a remainder of 38 when divided by 60 is a [[:en:Year|Year]] of Wuxu. {| class="wikitable" |+ '''Years of Wuxu''' |- ! === Events === * In the 9th year of [[:en:Tenpō|Tenpō]] ([[:en:1838|1838 AD]]), [[:en:Takano Chōei|Kōya Nagahide]] authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}. * In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ([[:en:1898|1898 AD]]), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the [[:en:Hundred Days' Reform|Wuxu Reform]] and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place. ==Months of Yang Earth Dog== In a [[:en:Common Era|Common Era]] year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of [[:en:September|September]] becomes the [[:en:Month|Month]] of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from [[:en:Hanlu|Hanro]] until the day before [[:en:Lidong|Rittō]]) as applicable. ==Days of Yang Earth Dog== The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows. === Day Selection === A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}. == See Also == * {{prefix|qq=}} * {{intitle|qq=}}

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dog also known as  戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr === Events ===
* In the 9th year of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} ({{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838 AD}}), {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Kōya Nagahide}} authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}.
* In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ({{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898 AD}}), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the {{ill|Hundred Days' Reform|en|Hundred Days' Reform|WD=Q917709|lt=Wuxu Reform}} and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place.
==Months of Yang Earth Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Dog==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dog also known as  戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr === Events ===
* In the 9th year of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} ({{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838 AD}}), {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Kōya Nagahide}} authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}.
* In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ({{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898 AD}}), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the {{ill|Hundred Days' Reform|en|Hundred Days' Reform|WD=Q917709|lt=Wuxu Reform}} and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place.
==Months of Yang Earth Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Dog==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

'''Yang Earth Dog also known as  戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. === Events ===
* In the 9th year of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} ({{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838 AD}}), {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Kōya Nagahide}} authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}.
* In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ({{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898 AD}}), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the {{ill|Hundred Days' Reform|en|Hundred Days' Reform|WD=Q917709|lt=Wuxu Reform}} and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place.
==Months of Yang Earth Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Dog==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dog also known as  戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū

**  Japanese:

=== Events ===
* In the 9th year of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} ({{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838 AD}}), {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Kōya Nagahide}} authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}.
* In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ({{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898 AD}}), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the {{ill|Hundred Days' Reform|en|Hundred Days' Reform|WD=Q917709|lt=Wuxu Reform}} and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place.
==Months of Yang Earth Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Dog==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dog|kanji=戊戌|romaji=tsuchinoe inu|onyomi=bojutsu|p=wùxū|w=wu-hsü|mi=u⁵⁵ ɕy|y=mou6 seot1|j=mou6 seot1|ci=mɐu sœt̚|mc=məu syt|oc-bs=mə ssu|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dog also known as  戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr === Events ===
* In the 9th year of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō}} ({{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838 AD}}), {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Kōya Nagahide}} authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}.
* In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ({{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898 AD}}), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the {{ill|Hundred Days' Reform|en|Hundred Days' Reform|WD=Q917709|lt=Wuxu Reform}} and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place.
==Months of Yang Earth Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month}} of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Dog==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dog|kanji=戊戌|romaji=tsuchinoe inu|onyomi=bojutsu|p=wùxū|w=wu-hsü|mi=u⁵⁵ ɕy|y=mou6 seot1|j=mou6 seot1|ci=mɐu sœt̚|mc=məu syt|oc-bs=mə ssu|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dog also known as  戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: boshu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

==Years of Yang Earth Dog==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 38 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|WD=Q577|lt=Year|1=Year}} of Wuxu.

=== Events ===
* In the 9th year of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} ({{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838 AD|1=1838}}), {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Kōya Nagahide|1=Takano Chōei}} authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}.
* In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ({{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898 AD|1=1898}}), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the {{ill|Hundred Days' Reform|en|Hundred Days' Reform|WD=Q917709|lt=Wuxu Reform|1=Hundred Days' Reform}} and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place.
==Months of Yang Earth Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Dog==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dog also known as  戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe === Events ===
* In the 9th year of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} ({{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838 AD|1=1838}}), {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Kōya Nagahide|1=Takano Chōei}} authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}.
* In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ({{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898 AD|1=1898}}), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the {{ill|Hundred Days' Reform|en|Hundred Days' Reform|WD=Q917709|lt=Wuxu Reform|1=Hundred Days' Reform}} and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place.
==Months of Yang Earth Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Dog==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dog also known as  戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth === Events ===
* In the 9th year of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} ({{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838 AD|1=1838}}), {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Kōya Nagahide|1=Takano Chōei}} authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}.
* In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ({{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898 AD|1=1898}}), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the {{ill|Hundred Days' Reform|en|Hundred Days' Reform|WD=Q917709|lt=Wuxu Reform|1=Hundred Days' Reform}} and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place.
==Months of Yang Earth Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Dog==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.

{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Dog|kanji=戊戌|romaji=tsuchinoe inu|onyomi=bojutsu|p=wùxū|w=wu-hsü|mi=u⁵⁵ ɕy|y=mou6 seot1|j=mou6 seot1|ci=mɐu sœt̚|mc=məu syt|oc-bs=mə ssu|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Dog also known as  戊戌''' (つちのえいぬ、ぼどのいぬ、ぼじゅつ) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|WD=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 35th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Dingyou|ja|1=Yin Fire Rooster|2=ja|丁酉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dingyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Jihai|ja|1=Yin Earth Pig|2=ja|己亥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jihai|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Pig|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin-Yang Five Elements|lt_ja=陰陽五行|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|WD=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}}’ {{ill|Wu|ja|戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|lt=Tsuchinoe (戊)|2=ja|3=戊|4=zh|5=戊|1=Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (戊)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Earth|ja|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|zh|Earth (土)|comment=doing this to prevent wrong interwiki linking by bot|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr chinesische Fümf-Elemänt-Leer|10=bcl|11=Daga (wuxing)|12=vi|13=Thổ (Ngũ hành)|1=Earth (wuxing)|lt=Earth (土)|2=ru|3=Земля (у-син)|4=mn|5=Шороо (махбод)|6=uk|7=Земля (У-сін)|8=als|9=Ärde in dr ==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Dog (戊戌)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wùxū
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 seot1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-inu
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-inu
***Onyomi 1: boshu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): musul (무술)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Mậu Tuất

=== Events ===
* In the 9th year of {{ill|Tenpō|en|Tenpō|WD=Q1369045|lt=Tenpō|1=Tenpō}} ({{ill|1838|en|1838|WD=Q7612|lt=1838 AD|1=1838}}), {{ill|Takano Chōei|en|Takano Chōei|WD=Q944693|lt=Kōya Nagahide|1=Takano Chōei}} authored the work {{ill|Wuxu Dream Tale|ja|戊戌夢物語|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Dream Tale|1=Bojutsu Yume Monogatari|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11495335}}.
* In the 24th year of {{ill|Guangxu|ja|光緒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Guangxu|1=Guangxu Era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1135852}} ({{ill|1898|en|1898|WD=Q7848|lt=1898 AD|1=1898}}), during the Qing dynasty, reforms and political upheaval known as the {{ill|Hundred Days' Reform|en|Hundred Days' Reform|WD=Q917709|lt=Wuxu Reform|1=Hundred Days' Reform}} and the {{ill|Wuxu Coup|ja|戊戌の政変|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxu Coup|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=戊戌の変法|1=Hundred Days' Reform|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q917709}} took place.
==Months of Yang Earth Dog==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|WD=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (i.e. when the Ten Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Xin|ja|辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|lt=Kanoto (辛)|2=ja|3=辛|4=zh|5=辛|1=Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (辛)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|lt=Hinoe (丙)|2=ja|3=丙|4=zh|5=丙|1=Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (丙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|September|en|September|WD=Q123|lt=September|1=September}} becomes the {{ill|Month|en|Month|WD=Q5151|lt=Month|1=Month}} of Wuxu. However, the term “month” here may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|WD=Q1193124|lt=Hanro|1=Hanlu}} until the day before {{ill|Lidong|en|Lidong|WD=Q1191018|lt=Rittō|1=Lidong}}) as applicable.
==Days of Yang Earth Dog==
The {{ill|Day Selection|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Day Selection|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for a Wuxu day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A Wuxu day is the 6th day of {{ill|Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja|天一天上|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Heaven, One Heaven|ja_comment=天一神|1=Tenitsu-shin|2=ja|3=天一神|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11442153}}.
